pending.body: `src/cli/run.rs:1310-1330` moves a completed milestone back to `selecting`, but the follow-up selection path in `src/cli/run.rs:728-763` and `src/cli/run.rs:786-855` just propagates any `AppError` from `select_next_milestone_bead` instead of persisting a safe fallback state. If plan loading, controller journal writes, or other local persistence fails during selection, `run start`, `run resume`, or `run sync-milestone` exits with an error and leaves the controller durably stuck in `selecting` with no operator-visible reason. That violates the bead requirement that mismatches/tool failures land in `blocked` or `needs_operator`. Add the same `needs_operator` fallback used in `persist_selection_failure_after_reconciliation` for this CLI sync path.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 8 -> Plan and Implement
